body:
Omar, good to finally have a moment to follow up on our conversation from last week — things have been moving quickly on a few fronts here at [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital).

I wanted to share that we've made a preliminary decision to move forward with term sheets for two of the climate infra deals we discussed, and your read on the grid-edge storage space was genuinely useful in sharpening our conviction there.

I'd love to loop you in more formally as we get into diligence; your network on the hardware supply chain side in particular feels highly relevant.

Would you have 30 minutes sometime the week of April 7th to connect — either a call or, if you're going to be in the city, happy to grab coffee?

Looking forward to continuing to work together on this.

Amara
